title: Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thrikkadavoor Sree Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple in Thrikkadavoor, Kollam district, Kerala, India, dedicated to Shiva.
overview.description: Thrikkadavoor Sree Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple in Thrikkadavoor, Kollam district, Kerala, India, dedicated to Shiva. One of the 108 Shiva Temples of Kerala, it is administered by the Travancore Devaswom Board. The temple holds an annual ten-day Srattu festival.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thrikkadavoor
topPlaces.description: Thrikkadavoor is a town and a neighbourhood of Kollam city in the state of Kerala, India, approximately 5 kilometres north of Kollam city centre. Thrikkadavoor was a separate panchayath till 2015.

topPlaces.name: Mathilil
topPlaces.description: Mathilil is a suburb of Kollam city in the Indian state of Kerala. Located approximately 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) north of Kollam town, it covers an area of 1.5 square kilometres (0.58 sq mi) and has a population of 12,560.

topPlaces.name: Anchalumoodu
topPlaces.description: Anchalumoodu is a town and neighbourhood of the city of Kollam, India. It is a historic town near the place, where the Peruman railway accident happened in 1988.

topPlaces.name: The Leela Ashtamudi
topPlaces.description: The Leela Ashtamudi, also known as The Raviz Kollam and The Raviz Ashtamudi, is a five-star hotel on the banks of the Ashtamudi lake in the city of Kollam, Kerala, India. It was designed by the Indian architect Eugene Pandala.

topPlaces.name: Asramam Sree Krishna Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Asramam Sree Krishna Swamy Temple is a Sreekrishna temple in the district of Kollam, Kerala, South India located on the shores of Ashtamudi Lake. Lord Krishna in the form of Navaneet Krishnan or Krishna with Butter is worshiped here.

topPlaces.name: Prakkulam
topPlaces.description: Prakkulam is a village in Thrikkaruva Grama Panchayat, Kollam district in the south west Indian state of Kerala, 12 km from Kollam junction railway station.

topPlaces.name: Kanjavely
topPlaces.description: Kanjavely is a village in the Thrikkaruva panchayat of Kollam district in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Asramam
topPlaces.description: Asramam or Ashramam is one of the prime locations in Kollam city of Kerala, India. It is one among the 55 wards of Kollam Municipal Corporation.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thrikkadavoor Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thrikkadavoor, Mathilil, Anchalumoodu, The Leela Ashtamudi, Asramam Sree Krishna Swamy Temple.
